mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.store_id, m.name, m.is_store_admin, md.`date` AS dayoff_date, md.dayoff_type FROM manager m LEFT JOIN manager_dayoff md ON md.manager_id = m.id AND md.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY m.id, md.`date`

SELECT m.id, m.store_id, m.name, m.is_store_admin, md.`date` AS dayoff_date, md.dayoff_type FROM manager m LEFT JOIN manager_dayoff md ON md.manager_id = m.id AND md.status = 'APPROVED' WHERE m.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY m.id, md.`date`

SELECT m.id, m.store_id, m.name, m.is_store_admin, md.`date` AS dayoff_date, md.dayoff_type FROM manager m LEFT JOIN manager_dayoff md ON md.manager_id = m.id AND md.status = 'APPROVED' WHERE m.id = #{id} ORDER BY md.`date`
